title: Market Brief — Tuesday, June 23, 2026
summary: GPU availability is loosening across every class: A100 at 30%, H100 at 29%, H200 at 41%, and B200 at 38% util-avail, all comfortably above scarcity thresholds. The headline move is H200 spot surging 13.4% day-over-day to $3.68/hr despite 41% availability, signaling a demand spike likely driven by inference workloads shifting to higher-memory cards rather than genuine supply tightening.
paragraphs: GPU availability is loosening across every class: A100 at 30%, H100 at 29%, H200 at 41%, and B200 at 38% util-avail, all comfortably above scarcity thresholds. The headline move is H200 spot surging 13.4% day-over-day to $3.68/hr despite 41% availability, signaling a demand spike likely driven by inference workloads shifting to higher-memory cards rather than genuine supply tightening.

B200 is the only GPU where mainstream inference turns a profit: TCO-adjusted cost for Llama 70B is $4.00/M tokens, making Medium-tier pricing barely viable. On H100 and H200, anyone selling at Medium rates is underwater, losing roughly $3.14/M and $3.83/M tokens respectively. Provider grades: OpenAI Neutral, milking o3 Pro premiums to subsidize gpt-oss giveaways. Anthropic Neutral, holding pricing power at the top. DeepSeek Burning Cash, V3.2 at $0.34/M output against $4.00/M TCO on B200.

OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b at $0.18/M output is the most aggressive loss-leader in the market and unsustainable, making it overvalued as a long-term price signal. B200 compute at $4.38/hr spot with 64% of NeoCloud offerings still free is undervalued relative to its margin advantage; accumulate B200 capacity and sell Llama 70B inference at High tier for 47% gross margin.
bullets: 41% util-avail on H200 makes it the loosest premium GPU class despite today's 13.4% spot price spike.
29% util-avail on H100 is the tightest availability reading across all four GPU classes.
62.4% B200 utilization dropped 18.7 percentage points in 30 days, the largest demand decline in the stack.
$0.18/M output on OpenAI gpt-oss-120b sits roughly 95% below TCO-adjusted production cost on B200.
21.78 LLMflation index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch at base 100.
130.5% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI is more than double B200's 61.2%, making H200 the riskiest compute position to hold.
